subject: Lucas Kriebel (@LucasKriebel) has sent you a direct message on Twitter!
details: @LucasKriebel - Very cool :) Nicklas, You have a new direct message.

subject: Last pic over my village
details: Yeah i'd like that! Do you remember the video you showed me of your train ride between Colombo and Kandy? The one with the mountain view? I would love to see that one again!

subject: Mochila Beta: Subscription Confirmed
details: You've been confirmed! Welcome to the ruling class of the inbox. For your records, here is a copy of the information you submitted to us...

details: Hej Nicklas Sandell! Vi vill bjuda in dig till 'First tour 2014', ett rekryteringsevent som erbjuder jobb på 16 semesterorter i Sverige.

subject: Re: New mail settings
details: Will you answer him asap?

subject: Off on Thursday
details: Eff that place, you might as well stay here with us instead! Sent from my iPhone 4 > 4 mar 2014 at 5:55 pm

details: Today's Friday and we thought maybe you want some music inspiration for the weekend. Here are some trending tracks and playlists we think you should give a listen!

details: That's great, see you on Thursday!

subject: Let's go fishing!
details: Hey, You wanna join me and Fred at the lake tomorrow? It'll be awesome.

subject: Hey man
details: Nah man sorry i don't. Should i get it?

subject: Home again!
details: That's just perfect! See you tomorrow.

details: Yes ok, great! I'm not stuck in Stockholm anymore, we're making progress.

subject: Hello
details: Trip home from Colombo has been arranged, then Jenna will come get me from Stockholm. :)

subject: Since you asked... and i'm inconceivably bored at the train station
details: Alright thanks. I'll have to re-book that somehow, i'll get back to you.
